name: appendix-k-huggingface
prompt: A warm, friendly illustration in watercolor and ink style showing a cheerful robot hugging a yellow smiling face logo, surrounded by floating model cards, dataset icons, and code snippets. The scene includes a pipeline conveyor belt processing text through transformers. Soft pastel background with tech elements. Educational textbook illustration style, no text or words.

name: appendix-l-langchain
prompt: A warm, friendly illustration in watercolor and ink style showing interconnected chain links made of colorful code blocks, each link containing a different AI operation: a magnifying glass for retrieval, a brain for reasoning, a toolbox for tools, and a chat bubble for conversation. The chain forms a flowing path. Soft pastel background. Educational textbook illustration style, no text or words.

name: appendix-m-langgraph
prompt: A warm, friendly illustration in watercolor and ink style showing a directed graph with colorful nodes representing AI agent states: thinking, acting, observing, deciding. Edges glow with flowing data. The graph forms a cycle pattern. Small friendly robots traverse the paths. Soft pastel background. Educational textbook illustration style, no text or words.

name: appendix-n-crewai
prompt: A warm, friendly illustration in watercolor and ink style showing a crew of diverse friendly robots working together around a planning table, each with a different tool: one with a magnifying glass, one with a wrench, one with a paintbrush, one typing on a keyboard. They collaborate on a shared task board. Soft pastel background. Educational textbook illustration style, no text or words.

name: appendix-o-llamaindex
prompt: A warm, friendly illustration in watercolor and ink style showing a friendly llama character organizing a vast library of documents into an indexed filing system. Documents flow through a funnel into neat vector embeddings represented as colorful dots in space. Soft pastel background. Educational textbook illustration style, no text or words.

name: appendix-p-semantic-kernel
prompt: A warm, friendly illustration in watercolor and ink style showing a glowing kernel (seed) at the center radiating connections to surrounding plugin blocks: memory, planning, skills, connectors. The plugins are arranged in concentric rings like an operating system kernel diagram, but organic and friendly. Soft pastel background. Educational textbook illustration style, no text or words.

name: appendix-q-dspy
prompt: A warm, friendly illustration in watercolor and ink style showing a scientist robot in a lab coat conducting prompt optimization experiments. Test tubes contain different prompt variations, a meter shows quality scores, and an automated loop connects input to output to evaluation. Soft pastel background. Educational textbook illustration style, no text or words.

name: appendix-r-experiment-tracking
prompt: A warm, friendly illustration in watercolor and ink style showing a scientist's notebook with charts, graphs, and metrics flowing into a digital dashboard. Multiple experiment runs are shown as parallel paths with different hyperparameters visualized as colored knobs. A comparison table floats above. Soft pastel background. Educational textbook illustration style, no text or words.

name: appendix-s-inference-serving
prompt: A warm, friendly illustration in watercolor and ink style showing a busy restaurant kitchen as a metaphor for model serving: requests arrive as order tickets, models are the chefs, GPUs are the stoves, and responses leave on serving trays. A queue manager orchestrates the flow. Soft pastel background. Educational textbook illustration style, no text or words.

name: appendix-t-distributed-ml
prompt: A warm, friendly illustration in watercolor and ink style showing multiple computers connected in a network, each holding a piece of a large neural network puzzle. Data flows between them via glowing connections. The pieces come together to form a complete model at the center. Soft pastel background. Educational textbook illustration style, no text or words.

name: appendix-u-docker-containers
prompt: A warm, friendly illustration in watercolor and ink style showing colorful shipping containers stacked neatly on a dock, each container transparent showing a different AI component inside: a model, a database, an API server. A friendly whale carries the containers. Soft pastel background. Educational textbook illustration style, no text or words.

name: appendix-v-tooling-ecosystem
prompt: A warm, friendly illustration in watercolor and ink style showing a vast toolbox opened up, revealing organized compartments with different AI tools: wrenches for orchestration, measuring tapes for evaluation, building blocks for agents, and magnifying glasses for observability. A decision tree helps choose the right tool. Soft pastel background. Educational textbook illustration style, no text or words.
